text_blocks.text: The show had originally planned on having four
judges following the Pop Idol format; however, only
three judges had been found by the time of the
audition round in the first season, namely Randy
Jackson, Paula Abdul and Simon Cowell. A fourth judge,
radio DJ Stryker, was originally chosen but he dropped
out citing "image concerns". In the second season, New
York radio personality Angie Martinez had been hired
as a fourth judge but withdrew only after a few days
of auditions due to not being comfortable with giving out
criticism. The show decided to continue with the three
judges format until season eight. All three original
judges stayed on the judging panel for eight
